title: melicope lohiauana
intro: Melicope lohiauana, also known as the Lohiau's melicope or Maui melicope, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rutaceae, native to the island of Hawaii. This plant has been traditionally used in Hawaiian medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Melicope lohiauana include its ability to reduce fever, treat wounds, and alleviate respiratory issues. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties, and it has also been used in traditional Hawaiian medicine for its antiseptic and antifungal properties.
